supportedModuleShape.description: A narrow internal-management module shape with one primary record type, one report/list view, and one create-edit form view.

boundaries.planningDependency: descriptor output MUST cite a valid solution-to-manifest planning artifact as its deterministic upstream source
boundaries.recommendationDependency: descriptor output MAY cite a solution-to-manifest recommendation artifact when optional guidance was reviewed
boundaries.assemblyRuntimeInput: contributors MUST still produce a standalone app-manifest before repository-owned assembly tooling is invoked
boundaries.moduleRegistryBoundary: descriptor output MUST stay inside the closed repository-owned module registry and MUST NOT register a new platform-owned module
boundaries.interactionBoundary: the first descriptor-driven path MUST reuse dynamic-form and dynamic-report instead of defining a parallel interaction system
boundaries.workflowBoundary: workflow-specific generation remains outside the first descriptor-driven management-module path

aiToolingGuidance.nextStep: Review planning output, optionally review recommendation guidance, prepare a bounded management-module descriptor, then produce a standalone app-manifest and controlled module-generation inputs before invoking ./scripts/platform-tool.sh assembly scaffold

columnsPath.description: Legacy flat-table path for simple report views

sectionsPath.description: Multi-section dashboard path supporting mixed visualization types
